name: Sugared Cranberry Trail Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spread almonds evenly on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake for 7-8 minutes, or until the nuts are slightly darker in color.
3. Cool completely.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 225 degrees.
5. In a large bowl, combine almonds, pretzels, and cranberries.
6. In a small bowl, beat egg white until foamy.
7. Pour the beaten egg white over the pretzel mixture; toss until well coated.
8. In another small bowl, combine remaining ingredients (sugar, cinnamon, salt).
9. Sprinkle the sugar mixture evenly over the pretzel mixture; toss until well coated.
10. Spread the mixture evenly on a greased baking sheet.
11. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
12. Cool completely on the pan.
13. Store in an airtight container.
